---
title: "Architecture"
pagetitle: "Skein Lite: Architecture"
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
import json
S = json.load(open("../evaluation/reports/site_stats.json"))
R = S["routing"]
def g(x): return f"{x:g}"
```

::: {.eyebrow}
One orchestrator, one gated answer path
:::

Sara is the shopping assistant behind the chat box. A shopper asks "where's my order", "a gift for my mum who loves yoga around \$60", "does the Flow Legging run small". Every one of those turns follows the same shape: a deterministic router picks a focus, one gated pipeline answers it, and a grounding check decides whether the answer ships, abstains, or goes to a person.

## One turn

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
  T([Shopper turn]) --> RT{Route<br/>rag/router.py}
  RT -->|asks for a person| ESC[Tiffany files a ready case<br/>for a human specialist]
  RT -->|genuinely ambiguous| CL[Ask one clarifying question]
  RT -->|a lane| GATES[Deterministic gates<br/>order PII · injection · enumeration]
  GATES -->|probe| REF[Polite refusal,<br/>before retrieval]
  GATES -->|clean| RET[Hybrid retrieve + rerank<br/>graph + governed metric]
  RET --> CONF{Confidence gate}
  CONF -->|thin evidence| AB[Abstain: offer the<br/>closest real options]
  CONF -->|enough| GEN[Groq 70B<br/>cited answer, streamed]
  GEN --> GR[Per-citation grounding check]
  GR --> OUT([Answer with source chips])
  GR -.->|low support or sampled| FA[Online RAGAS<br/>faithfulness queue]

  classDef guard fill:#f8ecec,stroke:#b23a3a,color:#13191e;
  classDef core fill:#e9f3f4,stroke:#0f7b84,color:#13191e;
  class RT,GATES,CONF,GR guard;
  class RET,GEN,ESC,OUT core;
```

The pink nodes are where the system says no or not yet. They are regex and set logic, not the model's judgment, because a model cannot be trusted to withhold data it can already see in its context. The full gate inventory is on [Reliability](reliability.qmd).

## The same pipeline, two clients

The web storefront is not the only thing that talks to Sara. A read-only [MCP](https://modelcontextprotocol.io/) server (`mcp_server/`) lets other surfaces use the same tools: a messaging bot, a care-team support copilot, or a shopper's own AI assistant. Each is a thin second client of the exact pipeline above, not a parallel copy, so every gate still runs below it.

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  WEB([Web storefront<br/>chat + voice]) --> API[FastAPI route]
  MCP([MCP client<br/>Telegram bot · support copilot]) --> SRV[mcp_server<br/>5 read-only tools]
  API --> PIPE[One gated pipeline<br/>route · gates · retrieve · answer]
  SRV --> PIPE
  PIPE --> ST[Qdrant · DuckDB · Neo4j]
  classDef core fill:#e9f3f4,stroke:#0f7b84,color:#13191e;
  class PIPE core;
```

A working one ships in `channels/telegram_bot.py`: a Telegram bot that connects as an MCP client, understands voice notes, and can reply by voice. The MCP surface is deliberately narrower than the web: it is anonymous and blocks all order and account disclosure, so it is strictly safer than a signed-out web visitor, who can unlock their own orders with a matching name and email. The tools, the connect command, and the safety posture are on [MCP](mcp.qmd).

## The lanes

Routing picks a focus, never a second safety surface. Each lane is a short role fragment added to the same system prompt, and every lane answers through the same gated pipeline in `pipeline/answer.py`.

| Lane | Voice | Handles |
|---|---|---|
| Stylist | Sara | Gifts, outfits, "what goes with this", with one sharp question before recommending |
| Care | Sara | Order status, returns, refunds, account, answered from the shopper's own verified records |
| Complaint | Sara | A damaged item, a wrong charge, a delay: acknowledge, own it, fix it, never upsell |
| Answers | Sara | Policies, shipping, sizing; answers only from context and says so when it is not there |
| Escalation | Tiffany | An explicit ask for a person: confirm the details, file one ready case, hand off warm |

A two-in-one turn ("suggest a gift and check my order") is split, each clause routed and answered, then stitched with the complaint part leading. The stitched reply reports the minimum grounding of its parts, never an invented score.

## The routing cascade

Routing is cheap-first: two free deterministic layers decide the majority, and only genuine ambiguity pays for one small model call.

| Layer | What it is | Cost |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | Regex intercept for an explicit "get me a person", refusals excluded | \$0 |
| 1 | Intent guards for complaint, care, and shopping cues | \$0 |
| 2 | One llama-3.1-8b classification call, only when layers 0 and 1 pass | < \$0.00001 |

On the labeled routing set of `{python} S["routing_eval_set"]` shopper turns:

| Mode | Accuracy | Escalation recall |
|---|---|---|
| Deterministic only (layers 0 + 1) | `{python} g(R["deterministic_pct"])`% | `{python} g(R["deterministic_escalation_recall_pct"])`% |
| Plus the 8B tie-break | **`{python} g(R["tiebreak_8b_pct"])`%** | **`{python} g(R["tiebreak_8b_escalation_recall_pct"])`%** |
| Plus a 70B tie-break instead | `{python} g(R["tiebreak_70b_pct"])`% | no better |

The 8B tie-break is the shipped configuration: it never misses a genuine request for a human, and the 70B scored below it at higher cost. That is the measured case for staying Groq-only. When even the 8B returns "unclear", the router asks one clarifying question instead of guessing.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Retired.** An earlier LangGraph agent brain ran this turn as a stateful graph. It was retired for the deterministic cascade above: same behavior contract, testable as pure functions, and no framework between a shopper and the answer. `CHAT_BRAIN=agent` now maps to the omni orchestrator.
:::

## Three retrieval seams

Vector similarity is good at "something like this" and bad at "exactly this number". Retrieval keeps three seams separate, so an authoritative fact is never averaged into a fuzzy score.

::: {.grid-cards}
::: {.card}
### Hybrid vectors
Cohere `embed-v4.0` dense plus a sparse BM25-style leg in Qdrant, fused, then reranked by `rerank-v3.5`. The default path for "a warm waterproof jacket for a rainy winter".
:::
::: {.card}
### Knowledge graph
Products, suppliers, and stores as typed Neo4j edges, traversed over an allowlist. Authoritative only when the query names the entity itself.
:::
::: {.card}
### Governed metrics
"What's the cheapest legging" or a stock check resolves through a validated semantic layer: the model fills slots, a resolver runs one parameterized SELECT on read-only DuckDB. The model never writes SQL and never sees raw rows.
:::
:::

## The stack

| Layer | Choice | Why |
|---|---|---|
| API | FastAPI, SSE | Tokens stream to the browser as generated |
| Orchestrator | Deterministic cascade + one gated pipeline | Routes in `rag/router.py`, answers in `pipeline/answer.py` |
| LLM | Groq llama-3.3-70b (workhorse), llama-3.1-8b (router) | Fast enough to stream; a gpt-oss-120b swap was held on measured faithfulness |
| Embeddings / rerank | Cohere embed-v4.0 + rerank-v3.5 | Strong multilingual retrieval |
| Vectors | Qdrant | Native sparse + dense in one query |
| Graph | Neo4j | Typed relationships, allowlisted traversals |
| Lakehouse | DuckDB medallion + dbt | Bronze to silver to gold, governance tests in CI |
| Web | Next.js 14 | The storefront and the chat and voice widget |
| MCP | `mcp_server` (FastMCP, stdio) | A read-only second client of the same pipeline for any MCP host; anonymous, order PII blocked |
| Voice | ElevenLabs TTS + Web Audio lip-sync | Spoken replies are deliberately shorter than typed ones |
| MLOps | MLflow, RAGAS, PSI drift monitors | Human-gated: nothing promotes itself |
| Observability | Langfuse | One root span per turn with model, tokens, latency, cost |

## Domain-agnostic by construction

The engine contains zero apparel references. The brand, catalog vocabulary, metrics, and persona names live in `domains/apparel_ecommerce/`, read at runtime from a manifest. A leak linter runs in CI and fails the build if a single domain term appears in engine code, which is what keeps "swap one folder, get a new assistant" true. A `{python} S["tests"]`-test pytest suite covers the engine.
